title: Zara's Big Feelings
synopsis: Zara learns to understand and express her big feelings with help from her loving family.

pages.text: Zara feels MAD! Her tower fell down. Red feelings swirl all around her.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes stands next to fallen blocks, surrounded by swirling angry red colors and jagged shapes representing mad feelings
illustration.alt: Zara looking angry with red swirls around her and fallen toy blocks

pages.text: Now Zara feels SAD. Big tears roll down her cheeks. Blue feelings rain down.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes crying with tears on her face, surrounded by blue raindrops and cloudy sad emotions floating around her
illustration.alt: Zara crying with blue rain-like sad feelings around her

pages.text: Mama comes over. 'I see your big feelings,' she says. She gives Zara a warm hug.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes being hugged by her mama, with purple and pink gentle swirls of comfort surrounding them both
illustration.alt: Zara being hugged by her mama with comforting colored swirls around them

pages.text: Mama helps Zara take deep breaths. In... and out... The red and blue feelings start to fade.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes breathing deeply with her mama, as red and blue swirls slowly transform into calmer green and purple colors
illustration.alt: Zara and mama breathing together as angry and sad colors fade to calm colors

pages.text: 'Let's build together,' Mama says. They stack blocks high. Zara feels HAPPY now!

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes smiling while building blocks with her mama, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and cheerful golden swirls of happiness
illustration.alt: Zara and mama building blocks together with happy yellow sunshine feelings around them

pages.text: All feelings are okay. Mad, sad, and happy too. Mama loves Zara no matter what she feels.

illustration.description: Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes hugging her mama, with a beautiful rainbow of all emotion colors - red, blue, yellow, and purple - swirling gently around them in harmony
illustration.alt: Zara and mama embracing with a rainbow of all different feeling colors around them

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color are Zara's mad feelings?
questions.explanation: Mad feelings are shown as red swirls around Zara.

questions.question: Who helps Zara with her big feelings?
questions.explanation: Mama comes over to help Zara and gives her a hug.

questions.question: What do Zara and Mama do together?
questions.explanation: Mama says 'Let's build together' and they stack blocks high.

questions.question: What does Mama say about feelings?
questions.explanation: The story says 'All feelings are okay. Mad, sad, and happy too.'
